transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Hello everyone
I filmed a Crocs commercial recently
[Where is Tzuyang at right now?]
[Where am I?]
[Nongshim X Crocs Advertisement Filming Studio]
Too cute~!!
So I prepared an event with Crocs
If I can succeed in 5 mukbang missions,
I get to choose a total of 20 comments (Acrostic Poem with CROCS) to give away these shoes
[It will be done through a random drawing]
Nongshim and Crocs made these Very cute, right?
I will put on a Jibbitz every time I succeed in a mission
And fill the crocs up
Let's start with the drumsticks
Let's go!

[First mission: Drumstick snack]
[1. Prepare a board with the quantity of the snacks]
[2. Throw the shoe and eat the amount that it lands on]
Hey, get out of the way!
[Attack!]
[Help me]
[1st kick]
[Will it land in the middle (bomb)?]
[2nd kick]
Why did you move it?
It was on '5 boxes'
[Distancing]
[3rd kick]
4!
[4 drumstick snacks]
All I need to do is finish 4 of these as a mission

Isn't that too easy?
This is tasty Do people still eat these?
I used to eat this all the time as a kid Not as much after growing up
It's really good
Right, 'find hidden objects' game
I remember playing this
[Setting up]
Delicious!
[My turn]
Drumstick
I can eat 100 of these drumsticks
I remember taking small bites out of this as a kid
And all the crumbs fall on the floor
How many of these can I fit in my mouth?
[I'm curious]
I can fit more, but it's not looking pretty I'll stop here

When Crocs contacted me, I thought it was going to be for shoes
Turns out it was indeed related to food
[This is a piece of cake]
[Drumstick Jibbitz to fit on the Crocs!]
[Cat fishing toy]
What is this?
I'm not a cat
I got it
It's in
Drumstick mission clear
[2nd Mission: Potato Chip]
[Pick out a ball and eat the amount it states]
2?
There was a way to open these bags
Yummy
I used to take my time eating these to savor every bite

[Now she's flexing]
It's perfectly seasoned out of all the potato chips in the market
I thought I would have to play the Potato Chip game for this mission
[Potato chip Jibbitz to fit on the Crocs!]
Cute
Over here should be good
There Cute, right?
[3rd Mission: Soldier Snack]
[1. Prepare 5 balloons with Soldier Snacks inside them]
[2. Pop 1 and eat the amount it states]
Pop it?
Which one?
[Sound warning]
It was inside?
You can literally see what's inside these balloons
There's 1 more here

This has a variety of flavors
It's tasty
Yum
[It's best when you eat a stack of them]
[Charge!]
I haven't eaten this many snacks since middle school
[Just built different]
5 floors
Can't do it
[Slowly starting to disappear]
[The crumbs are the best]
[Soldier Jibbitz to fit on the Crocs!]
There it is again
Banana Soldier
[4th Mission: Banana Kick]
Next!

Again
That was weird
[Acting is hard]
[Raffle]
[Go down the ladder to get the amount]
I'll go with #3
2 bags!
These are huge
This is not the regular bag
It's a family-size
The amount
So good
These are sweet, but just the bits
I'm not good at explaining things
Crispy, but it melts in your mouth
[You know what I mean.. ^^]

[Double]
I used to love the chocolate covered ones
3 pieces
It's scraping the roof of my mouth
[It's still worth it]
It goes by pretty quick because it melts away
What if I ate popcorn like this at the movie theaters?
[Let's speed it up]
Last piece
Finished
It moves now?
[Banana Kick Jibbitz to fit on the Crocs!]
[5th Mission: Shrimp Crackers]
Next!
These aren't for me, right? [Cat treat]
[Jingu will choose her fate]

[Player has entered the arena]
Treats for you, Jingu
[I don't want it]
Let's bring Munji
[Player 2 has entered the arena]
Treats for you, Munji
[Eat this, please]
[2 bags!]
2 again
He's finished it already
[Churu heaven]
#2 and #1
So many of them
That shrimp flavor
The last bag was given to the seagulls
It's been a while and it's still good

Why do I feel like a seagull now?
[Munji: I will be a seagull too then]
No
[Let me help you]
Finished
[Shrimp Crackers Jibbitz to fit on the Crocs!]
[Nongshim X Crocs Jibbitz Mission Clear!]
I've collected all 5 of them
Complete
I was able to do all of the missions
Leave a comment (Acrostic Poem with CROCS) with your email
20 of them will be chosen for the giveaway
Thanks everyone
[Back to the studio]
[Getting ready]
[Ready to go]

Hello everyone
I'm here to film a Crocs commercial
[Awkward]
[Getting busy]
That was good improv
[Thinking about food]
[I'll eat it later]
[And for the last scene]
Very cute~!!
[Finished!!]
[How did you hold your cravings]
I'm hungry!!
[Getting a meal]
[Can't forget the dessert]
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
